question_text: A 4 kg box is being pushed across a table. The friction force is 20 N. What would be the friction force if the box were replaced with an identical box placed on top of it (total mass 8 kg), assuming the same table and pushing speed?
explanation: Friction increases when the weight (normal force) increases. Doubling the mass from 4 kg to 8 kg doubles the weight pressing down on the table, so the friction force also doubles from 20 N to 40 N.
